full_text: So if you have any teens out there, have a look at Menstrual Project, they're fabulous. End of UK, I've also got lots of stuff back in ages, and so does the Endometrius Foundation.

End of UK, I've also got lots of stuff back in ages, and so does the Endometrius Foundation.
